title: White House Releases New Files Showing Mysterious Orb Videos, Accounts Of UFO Sightings
description: By Elizabeth Troutman Mitchell, The Daily Signal | June 12, 2026 The White House released its third tranche of unidentified anomalous phenomena files on Friday, including firsthand accounts from government agents claiming to have observed mysterious flying objects. The files feature a memo...

title: Steven Spielberg's bombshell UFO admission: 'I now believe the believers'
description: The Oscar-winning director has spoken about UFO sightings and says growing public testimony and footage have shifted his views on extraterrestrial claims.

title: GLEN KEOGH: Will Trump's family connection to UFO obsessed geek Gary McKinnon finally free him from threat of a US supermax prison
description: It would be fair to say that President Donald Trump has a lot on his plate, not least the wars in Iran and Ukraine and the looming midterm elections later this year.

title: Object over Cheyenne Mountain reported in latest UFO files
UFO over Zimbabwe’s main airport in 2008 had America’s CIA on ‘high alert,’ new files reveal
description: The New York Post The Central Intelligence Agency placed its assets in Zimbabwe on high alert in the summer of 2008 after a UFO was spotted hovering directly over Robert Mugabe International Airport, then named Harare International Airport. The incident, which took place July 2, 2008, is detailed in a cable that was released Friday [...] The post UFO over Zimbabwe’s main airport in 2008 had America’s CIA on ‘high alert,’ new files reveal appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
